title: Web App Flask: Estrutura Base + Servidor Local + Layout com Tabs
plan: Create Flask app module structure: web/ directory with __init__.py, app.py, routes/
Add Flask and dependencies to requirements or project config
Create base.html Jinja2 template with dark theme layout, header, logo, tab navigation (Cash/Torneios)
Create sub-navigation component with tabs: Overview, Sessions, Stats, Leaks, EV Analysis, Range, Tilt
Create individual page templates inheriting from base.html for each sub-tab under Cash and Torneios
Create static CSS file with dark theme, responsive design, clean modern styling
Create static JS file for tab switching and interactive behavior
Implement analytics.db reading layer to fetch and pass data to templates
Add 'serve' CLI command to main.py with --port option and auto browser open
Configure Flask debug mode for hot reload in dev
Test the full flow: CLI serve command, page rendering, tab navigation, responsiveness
